title: Vanilla Extensions
description: Finally, giving Minecraft a more complete experience.
body:
#

Welcome to the Official Page of Vanilla Extensions: The Minecraft Mod!

--- ## Vanilla Extensions ### is a unique and engaging Minecraft mod that aims to enhance your Minecraft experience by adding a wide array of exciting new content. From lush crops and diverse food to fantastical mobs, stunning biomes, and powerful tools and weapons, this mod has it all! --- #

What's New?

## Crops, Plants, and Foods Venture into the world of Vanilla Extensions and discover a plethora of new crops and plants. We've carefully crafted these new additions to seamlessly blend into the Minecraft ecosystem. And what's more? You can now cook a diverse range of food items using these crops. The culinary possibilities are limitless! ## Ores & Alloys Unearth the treasures beneath the surface with the addition of new ores like Tin. Discover the beauty and utility of Bronze, an alloy we've added to the game. Forge your own path with these resources that bring a whole new dimension to your mining and crafting journey. ## Tools, Weapons & Armour Experience the thrill of using our newly added bronze tools, weapons, and armour. Feel the weight of the bronze sword in your hand and the sturdy protection of the bronze armour. The Bronze Age has arrived in Minecraft and with it, a slew of new exciting opportunities for adventure and combat! ## Mobs Make way for the dazzling Gold Golem, a new addition to our growing list of mobs. This luminescent creature adds an intriguing challenge to your Minecraft adventures. Stay tuned as we continue to enrich the game with more unique and interactive mobs! --- #

Coming Soon

## Biomes Prepare yourself for a journey like no other. Our upcoming biomes will offer diverse landscapes and unique opportunities for adventure. Get ready to explore! ## Dimensions Prepare to delve into the unknown with our forthcoming dimensions. Brace yourselves for a journey beyond the ordinary that will test your skills and wits! --- #

Wiki & Community

If you're new to our mod or need help getting started, check out our handy [Wiki](https://keiths-update.fandom.com/wiki/Keith%27s_Update_Wiki) If you have any suggestions, find any bugs or just build something cool with our mod? Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hHA9XXcWBr) and show us! If you love the mod I really appreciate it just wait until we do the first full release before you add it to any world you use long term, we are still adding many plants, crops and other structures that will spawn naturally in your world so starting your world with our mod now might not let you have those added features within your preloaded chunks. I'll be adding more things to this mod once a week!!! Might be a little update with a few items or bug fixes, might be a big one with new structures or mobs, but you'll get one every Friday, so make sure to come back and check out the new content I'll be adding!! Leave any comments you have about the mod if you try it.
